title: clio ring action catalog
description: Declarative catalog of ring actions. Each action runs a clio command, opens a URL, or opens a path. Edited by hand; validated at load time by clio ring.

$schema.title: Schema reference
$schema.description: Path or URL to this JSON Schema (enables editor validation + hover help).

Actions.title: Actions
Actions.description: The outer-ring actions, in ring order.

iconName.title: Icon
iconName.description: Name of a built-in stroke icon. One consistent family; colour encodes state, not the icon.

kind.title: Action kind
kind.description: Selects which typed block is active: ClioCommand | OpenUrl | OpenPath | GuidedInstall (opens the guided Creatio Install form; no typed block) | GuidedUninstall (opens the guided Creatio Uninstall flow; no typed block).

risk.title: Risk
risk.description: Confirmation gate. None runs immediately; Confirm/Destructive prompt first (Destructive is visually flagged).

parameterType.title: Parameter type
parameterType.description: Runtime type used to render/validate a prompted parameter.

Required.title: Required
Required.description: Whether a value must be supplied.

Default.title: Default
Default.description: Optional default value (string form, coerced by ParameterType).

Verb.title: Verb
Verb.description: clio verb, e.g. get-info (may also be a raw switch like --version).

Args.title: Arguments
Args.description: Extra arguments appended verbatim after the verb.

EnvName.title: Environment
EnvName.description: Optional fixed environment. When null, the selected environment is used.

Url.title: URL
Url.description: Absolute URL to open in the default browser.

Path.title: Path
Path.description: File-system path to open with the OS shell.

Id.title: Id
Id.description: Stable unique id for the action.

ShortTitle.title: Short title
ShortTitle.description: Optional concise label shown on the ring node (falls back to Title).

ConfirmText.title: Confirmation text
ConfirmText.description: Confirmation copy naming the concrete consequence + target. Supports the {env} placeholder.

RequireTypedConfirm.title: Require typed confirmation
RequireTypedConfirm.description: When true, the confirm dialog also requires the user to type the exact selected environment name before running. Use for irreversible actions.

ConsequenceText.title: Consequence line
ConsequenceText.description: Optional explicit consequence line shown prominently in the confirm dialog (distinct from ConfirmText), spelling out the concrete irreversible effect.

RefreshEnvironmentsOnSuccess.title: Refresh environments on success
RefreshEnvironmentsOnSuccess.description: When true, reloads clio's registered-environment catalog after the command exits successfully.
